questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain why the garment industry is a source of market failure (paragraph [8]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For an externalities diagram, the vertical axis may be price, p, or costs/benefits.
The horizontal axis may be quantity or q. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an externalities diagram, explain why the garment industry is a source of market failure (paragraph [8]).
breadcrumbLabels: 2.8 Market failure—externalities and common pool or common access resources
